query:
-- 1. Listar TODOS os Blocos com contagem de Ações vinculadas
SELECT 
  b.id,
  b.nome as bloco_nome,
  b.status,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) as total_acoes
FROM blocos b
LEFT JOIN macros m ON b.id = m.blocoId
LEFT JOIN micros mi ON m.id = mi.macroId
LEFT JOIN actions a ON mi.id = a.microId
GROUP BY b.id, b.nome, b.status
ORDER BY total_acoes DESC, b.nome;
